channel.title: FierceBiotech — Health, Longevity & Diet
channel.description: FierceBiotech articles filtered for longevity, health, diet, and healthspan research

item.title: A new benchmark for biotech IPOs? Kailera raises $625M to fund obesity pipeline
item.description: Kailera Therapeutics appears to have set a new benchmark for biotech IPOs with an upsized $625 million offering to fund its pipeline of obesity therapies.

item.title: 'Absent or trivial' effects: Anti-amyloid Alzheimer's drugs called into question once again
item.description: The anti-amyloid drug class has yielded some FDA approvals and plenty of failed candidates. Now, researchers are looking at the overall track record of the group and painting an unpleasant picture about the efficacy of these drugs.

item.title: Rare Disease Research, myTomorrows team up to help patients access trials
item.description: Clinical trial site network Rare Disease Research (RDR) is partnering with health tech company myTomorrows to increase trial visibility and support more referrals from community and specialist care settings for rare disease trials.

item.title: Labcorp launches rapid fentanyl test with 48-hour detection window
item.description: While fentanyl overdose deaths have been falling in recent years, use of the drug remains a major public health crisis in the U.S., and now Labcorp is launching a new test designed to detect the drug’s use for up to 48 hours after exposure.

item.title: Australia’s Kazia pays research institute $1.4M for epigenetic platform, preclinical drug
item.description: Kazia Therapeutics is paying $1.4 million upfront to secure a platform for generating epigenetic drugs from an Australian research institute.
